investigation_summary: Context row: dominant US broadline foodservice distributor — most restaurant/institution ingredients flow through Sysco & peers. FTC blocked US Foods merger (~75% share risk). DOJ price-fixing investigation history. Warehouse OSHA citations; driver union pockets.

profile.tax_summary: Standard distributor taxation; not author emphasis.
profile.legal_summary: FTC/DOJ stopped US Foods tie-up over 75% concentration risk; DOJ investigated industry price-fixing (monitor docket for Sysco-specific outcomes).
profile.labor_summary: UFCW in some markets; warehouse injury rates above average in reporting.
profile.environmental_summary: Logistics footprint; indirect to farm sourcing debate.
